properties.name: Baga Beach
properties.ai_attribution: Moderate chlorophyll levels detected. Recent reports of plastic debris near northern shoreline. Water temperature within seasonal norms.

properties.name: Calangute Beach
properties.ai_attribution: Elevated SST (+1.2°C above baseline). High visitor density contributing to increased waste reports. Enhanced monitoring recommended.

properties.name: Anjuna Beach
properties.ai_attribution: Clean water conditions. SST within normal range. Low hazard report density. Community cleanup initiative showing positive results.

properties.name: Palolem Beach
properties.ai_attribution: Excellent environmental conditions. Clear water visibility confirmed by satellite. Minimal waste. Community conservation efforts effective.

properties.name: Vagator Beach
properties.ai_attribution: Below-average safety score. Seasonal seaweed bloom detected via Copernicus satellite. Reduced water clarity. Exercise caution when swimming.
